control_name: FSC008-002 Review of SAP configured discounts and rebates control
control_desc:
WHAT & WHY: Gross to net sales calculation. Price conditions in SAP representing selling price or deductions are reviewed to ensure that the gross sales, discounts and net sales reported are accurate; and discounts applied are valid and approved.

HOW: a full review of all SAP price conditions related to sales is performed once a year. During the months when the full review is not performed, the changes on those sales related price conditions are reviewed by the Supply Chain Manager, CFO or delegates.

Full review: a report (UKMC only: 30 & Z5-ZL & ZF) is extracted from SAP (transaction V/LD) with all the price conditions related to sales/customers. Accuracy and completeness of the report in SAP is proved by taking screenshots of the parameters to ensure that all the conditions are included. Comments on validity of the price conditions are added by the Supply Chain team or delegates, and the report in excel with the comments is sent to the Supply Chain Manager, CFO or delegates for review and sign-off.

Changes during the month: a report with all the changes during the month is extracted from SAP (transaction  ZV231213 and V/LD 30). Accuracy and completeness of the report in SAP is proved by taking screenshots of the parameters to ensure that all the conditions are included. Comments on validity of the change are added by the Supply Chain team or delegates, and the report in excel with the comments is sent to the Supply Chain Manager, CFO or delegates for review and sign-off
 
If errors are detected during the review, clear action plan or evidence of the correction is added.

WHEN: Monthly before WD15 (December by WD8)

3) Condition Type = ZL01
4) Validity Range = 01.10.2023 to 31.10.2023
5) Type of report = Classical Report

3) Condition Type = ZL01

%

Match the records of IPE_4.jpg with the records in IPE_4.xlsx. 
Step1: retrieve  the  first row and last row from IPE_4.xlsx.
Step2: retrieve the first row from IPE_4.jpg
Step3:  retrieve the last row from IPE_4.jpg
Step4: Retrieve the number of rows in IPE_4.xlsx

%

In IPE_5a.jpg and IPE_5b.jpg 
1) T-Code = VL/D 
2) Sales Organisation = GB10
3) Validity Range = 01.10.2023 to 31.10.2023 

%
IPE_5* "ZF01 Hierarchy" Validation: Validate the overall pricing report input parameters.
%

Refer data in IPE_6a.jpg, IPE_6b.jpg, IPE_6c.jpg, IPE_6d.jpg, and IPE_6e.jpg. Count only the visible table rows where the first column (CnTy) explicitly displays the value 'ZF01'. A row is valid only when 'ZF01' is visibly present in that row. Ignore customer header information, column headers, blank rows, totals, and any text outside the table. Do not infer, estimate, or assume hidden, collapsed, paginated, or off-screen rows. Count only rows that are visibly displayed in the provided screenshots. Calculate the total number of valid ZF01 rows across all screenshots. If the total count equals 24, return PASS. If the total count is not equal to 24, return FAIL. The response should include only the total valid ZF01 row count and the PASS/FAIL result. %
IPE_6 "ZF01 Hierarchy" Validation: Ensure the completeness and accuracy of ZL01 report used in the control performance
%

In IPE_7.jpg

2) Sales Organisation = GB10
3) Condition Type = ZA01
4) Validity Range = 01.10.2023 to 31.10.2023
5) Type of report = Classical Report 

%

Match the no. of records found in IPE_8.jpg and IPE_8.xlsx. 
Step 1: retrieve row counts from  IPE_8.xlsx. 
Step2: retrieve row counts from IPE_8.jpg Step3: Check if both are same.

Monthly Review: In cpt.xlsx 1) Verify that comments on validity of the price conditions for period 'ZL01', 'ZF01', 'ZF01 Hierarchy' & 'ZA01' are added. 
- In cpt.jpg, 1) Verify that the email mentiond that the monthly review is performed before WD15.
